name: 上海光源
description: Major Chinese synchrotron with dedicated ARPES beamlines; serves condensed matter physics community.

name: 北京同步辐射装置
description: First-generation Chinese synchrotron at IHEP; photoemission endstation available.

name: 合肥光源
description: USTC-operated synchrotron; VUV and soft X-ray beamlines for photoemission spectroscopy.

name: 台湾光子源
description: Newest synchrotron in Asia; high-brightness beamlines including ARPES capabilities at NSRRC.

name: SPring-8
description: World's largest third-generation synchrotron; soft and hard X-ray ARPES beamlines.

name: HiSOR
description: University-based synchrotron specializing in spin-resolved ARPES (Okuda group).

name: UVSOR-III
description: Institute for Molecular Science synchrotron; VUV photoemission beamlines.

name: Photon Factory
description: KEK synchrotron; ARPES and photoemission beamlines for condensed matter research.

name: Pohang Light Source-II
description: Korean synchrotron at POSTECH; dedicated ARPES beamlines (Kim Keun Su group).

name: Advanced Light Source
description: LBNL synchrotron; multiple ARPES endstations including MERLIN and MAESTRO beamlines.

name: Stanford Synchrotron Radiation Lightsource
description: SLAC-operated synchrotron; beamlines 5-4 and 10.0.1 dedicated to ARPES (Lu Donghui).

name: National Synchrotron Light Source II
description: BNL-operated synchrotron; ARPES endstations operated by Valla and Johnson groups.

name: Swiss Light Source
description: PSI synchrotron; world-class ARPES beamlines including ADRESS and PEARL (Shi Ming group).

name: Diamond Light Source
description: UK national synchrotron; I05 ARPES beamline serving European condensed matter community.

name: SOLEIL
description: French national synchrotron; CASSIOPEE and ANTARES beamlines for ARPES.

name: BESSY II
description: Berlin synchrotron; world-leading ARPES beamlines including spin-resolved (UE112) and 1-ARPES.

name: MAX IV
description: Swedish national synchrotron; Bloch and Veritas beamlines for ARPES (Leandersson group).

name: Elettra
description: Italian synchrotron; BaDElPh and APE beamlines for ARPES (Fujii, Petaccia groups).

name: ANKA
description: Karlsruhe synchrotron; photoemission beamline for condensed matter research.

name: ASTRID2
description: Aarhus University synchrotron; SGM4 beamline for ARPES (Hofmann group).

name: LNLS
description: Brazilian synchrotron; new Sirius facility with planned ARPES capabilities.

name: Australian Synchrotron
description: Australian synchrotron; soft X-ray spectroscopy beamline with photoemission capabilities.

name: Canadian Light Source
description: Canadian synchrotron; QMSC and VLS-PGM beamlines for photoemission spectroscopy.

name: ALBA
description: Spanish synchrotron; LOREA beamline for ARPES on quantum materials.

name: SESAME
description: Middle East's first synchrotron; future photoemission beamline planned.

name: Indus-2
description: Indian synchrotron; ARPES beamline under development for quantum materials research.

name: European XFEL
description: Free-electron laser facility; ultrafast time-resolved photoemission at femtosecond timescales.

name: LCLS
description: SLAC free-electron laser; ultrafast time-resolved ARPES and trARPES capabilities.

name: FLASH
description: DESY free-electron laser; time-resolved photoemission experiments on quantum materials.

name: FERMI
description: Seeded FEL at Elettra; ultrafast ARPES and time-resolved spectroscopy capabilities.
